briefs.title: Summerland Added to Designated Accommodation Tax Zone — Effective March 1, 2026
briefs.summary: Starting March 1, 2026, the District of Summerland will be added to BC's Designated Accommodation Area Tax program. This means short-term accommodation providers in Summerland — such as hotels, motels, and vacation rentals — will be required to collect and remit an additional provincial sales tax on accommodation sales.
briefs.action_required: Register to collect the Designated Accommodation Area Tax in Summerland before March 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: Summerland Designated Accommodation Area Tax takes effect
